extended_help:
View all items, equipment, and consumables you own.

**Features:**
- Auto-sort by rarity (Legendary → Common)
- Calculate total sell value
- Automatic pagination (10 items/page)
- Dropdown to use consumables directly

**Shows:**
- ⚡ Current stamina
- 📦 Unique item count
- 💰 Total inventory value
- Description & sell price per item

Use after /explore, /hunt, or /fish to check grinding results.
